title: The Recording Pack
description: This pack is just for me and my friends when we go to record!
body:
# The Recording Pack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience, making it easier and more enjoyable to record sessions with friends.

**Includes:**
### Essential Tools
- ffmpeg 7.0.1 essentials: Essential for rendering replays within Minecraft, ensuring high-quality video captures of your sessions.

### Mods
- 3D Skin Layers 1.6.5: Adds depth to player skins, making them appear more three-dimensional and detailed.
- Cloth Config API 13.0.121+fabric: A required library for many mods to provide easy configuration options.
- Continuity 3.0.0-beta.5+1.20.2: Improves the appearance of connected textures, enhancing the visual appeal of blocks.
- Entity Culling 1.6.5: Optimizes rendering by not drawing entities outside of your view, boosting performance.
- Essential Mod 1.3.2.7: Adds essential multiplayer features, including friends, skin switching, and profile switching.
- Fabric API 0.97.1+1.20.4: Core library for running Fabric mods, ensuring compatibility and functionality.
- Kotlin Language Fabric 1.11.0+kotlin.2.0.0: Required for mods written in Kotlin, providing language support.
- Falling Leaves 1.15.6+1.20.1: Adds falling leaves to the game, creating a more immersive environment.
- Immediatelyfast 1.2.18+1.20.4-fabric: Enhances performance by optimizing various aspects of rendering.
- Iris Shaders 1.7.1+1.20.4: Allows for the use of shaders, improving the visual quality of the game.
- LambDynamicLights 2.3.4+1.20.4: Adds dynamic lighting effects, making light sources like torches more realistic.
- Lithium mc1.20.4-0.12.1: Optimizes many aspects of the game to improve performance without compromising features.
- Mod Menu 9.2.0-beta.2: Adds a menu for managing installed mods, making it easier to configure and troubleshoot.
- Not Enough Animations 1.7.3: Adds more animations to the game, enhancing character movements and interactions.
- Presence Footsteps 1.9.4+1.20.4: Adds immersive footstep sounds, varying based on the surface and player actions.
- ReplayMod 1.20.4-2.6.15: Allows you to record, replay, and share your Minecraft sessions with ease.
- Sodium mc1.20.4-0.5.8: A performance mod that significantly improves frame rates and reduces lag.
- Toggle Nametags 2.0.5: Allows you to toggle player nametags on and off for a cleaner recording.
- Visuality 0.7.4+1.20.4: Adds various particle effects, enhancing visual immersion.
- Wavey Capes 1.4.7: Adds physics to capes, making them wave more realistically as you move.
- YetAnotherConfigLib 3.5.0+1.20.4-fabric: Provides a library for easy mod configuration.
- Zoomify 2.13.5+1.20.4: Adds a smooth zoom feature, perfect for highlighting details during recordings.
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features 6.1: Enhances entity textures with additional customization options.
- e4mc 5.0.0: Allows users to open their singleplayer world to LAN and create a temporary IP for others to join.

### Shaders
- BSL 8.2.09: A high-quality shader pack that enhances lighting, shadows, and overall visual fidelity.
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined r5.2.1: A balanced shader pack that improves visuals while maintaining good performance.
- Kappa Shader 5.2: A beautiful shader pack known for its realistic lighting and vibrant colors.
- Solas Shader 2.0: Offers stunning visual effects, including realistic water, lighting, and atmospheric effects.

---

**Disclaimer:** None of the content in this pack is my own creation. All rights and ownership of the included mods belong to their respective authors.

**Note:** Before you start using this modpack, please change your settings and keybinds. Many keys overlap with each other by default, and adjusting them will ensure a smoother experience.
